field-scopes.description.description: Short description of what this field scope covers
field-scopes.description.entries: Per-field access level rules contained in this scope
field-scopes.description.entry.access: The level of access granted to this field
field-scopes.description.entry.access.ED: Field is fully readable and writable
field-scopes.description.entry.access.HI: Field is not visible or included in responses
field-scopes.description.entry.access.MA: Field value is partially obscured (e.g. phone or ID number masking)
field-scopes.description.entry.access.VI: Field value is shown in full but cannot be edited
field-scopes.description.entry.field: Field name within the resource this rule applies to
field-scopes.description.entry.fieldScop: The ID of the field scope this rule entry belongs to
field-scopes.description.entry.resource: Resource identifier for this rule entry
field-scopes.description.name: Display name for this field scope configuration
field-scopes.description.resource: The resource identifier this scope applies to (e.g. entity class name or API path prefix)
field-scopes.title.name: Name
